metadata.title: Yuthikal AudioTech
metadata.description: Your digital music stand for guitar: chords, songs and karaoke mode with real audio.

errorDb.title: The database is unavailable due to inactivity
errorDb.description: Contact the administrator to restore the service. Your playlists and songs are safe.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or was moved.

landing.badge: Your digital music stand for guitar
landing.title: Your music, your chords, <accent>your stage</accent>
landing.subtitle: Learn chords, write your songs with lyrics and chord charts, and play them karaoke-style with real synchronized audio — all in one place.
landing.featuresTitle: From the chord to the stage

features.finderDesc: Search by voice or text and browse every position of each chord on the neck.
features.referenceDesc: Strings and notes in Spanish and English, with traditional names and equivalences.
features.songsDesc: Lyrics with chords anchored to each syllable, in the classic chord-sheet format.
features.karaokeDesc: Play the real audio and follow the lyrics and chords in perfect sync.

landing.karaokeTitle: Play the real audio and follow the synced lyrics
landing.karaokeDesc: The current line lights up, chords appear right when they change and the music stand scrolls by itself. Perfect for your phone or tablet while you play.

strings.title: The guitar strings
strings.intro: From the highest and thinnest (1st) to the lowest and thickest (6th). In standard tuning, their notes are E–B–G–D–A–E.

notes.title: The musical notes
notes.intro: The 12 notes of the chromatic scale: 7 natural and 5 altered notes (sharps and flats), which on the guitar live one fret apart.

instruments.title: Choose your instrument
instruments.subtitle: Start with the guitar. More instruments are coming to your digital music stand soon.

guitar.name: Guitar
guitar.desc: Chords, strings, notes and your songs.
